short_description: Board sitting relocation and start time change for December 17
description: Year end board sitting moved to Maplewood Board Chamber, Room 210, new start time 5:30 PM on 2026-12-17. Supersedes the earlier library booking. Approved by district facilities.

short_description: Hiring and staffing freeze pulled forward
description: Staffing freeze effective 2026-12-11, pulled forward from the previously published date. All postings advancing past this date are frozen pending board direction.
